descriptionEn: Name may mean "affection." He is the son of Zerubbabel or Zorobabel and mentioned in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ.

verses.line: Which was the son of Joanna, which was the son of Rhesa, which was the son of Zorobabel, which was the son of Salathiel, which was the son of Neri,

images.caption: Which was the son of Joanna, which was the son of Rhesa, which was the son of Zorobabel, which was the son of Salathiel, which was the son of Neri
